title: SpeedMasteur
description: A complete speedrun plugin to start, follow and reset Minecraft runs with one click.
body:
SpeedMasteur – The Ultimate Minecraft Speedrun Plugin

SpeedMasteur is a high-performance Paper plugin designed to provide a complete and reliable multiplayer speedrun experience. It offers a fully integrated system to manage runs from start to finish, without manual setup or inconsistencies.

A Complete Speedrun Workflow

The plugin is built around a clear and efficient structure:

A dedicated lobby is automatically created
Runs can be launched instantly in Survival or Hardcore
Worlds are generated and prepared automatically
Players are teleported and synchronized before the start
A global countdown ensures a clean and fair beginning

This workflow removes all unnecessary setup and allows players to focus entirely on the run.

Real-Time Run Management

During a run, SpeedMasteur provides:

A live timer displayed in the action bar
Clear session states (starting, running, paused)
A pause system that works both manually and automatically
Automatic pause when a player disconnects
Seamless resume when all players are back

Everything is designed to keep the run synchronized and stable.

Multiplayer and Spectator System

SpeedMasteur handles multiplayer behavior natively:

Active players and spectators are separated
Late joiners automatically become spectators
Spectators can follow active players easily
The system prevents interference with the ongoing run
Controlled and Consistent Environment

To ensure fairness and consistency:

All dimensions are locked to the speedrun session
No escape to external or vanilla worlds
Respawn behavior is controlled and predictable
Beds and anchors are supported when valid
Survival and Hardcore Modes

The plugin supports two distinct playstyles:

Survival mode

The run continues even if players die

Hardcore mode

A single death instantly ends the run
A full reset is triggered automatically
Reliable Reset System

At the end of each run, everything is reset:

Inventory, armor and offhand
Health, hunger and experience
Ender chest and effects
Advancements, statistics and recipes

Offline players are also handled, with a reset applied on their next login.

Stability and Reliability

SpeedMasteur continuously tracks the state of the run:

Timer
Players
Mode
Seed
Pause status

This prevents issues related to disconnections or server restarts and ensures a consistent experience at all times.

Summary

SpeedMasteur is a complete and production-ready solution for Minecraft speedrunning. It simplifies setup, enforces consistent rules, and delivers a stable multiplayer experience suitable for both casual play and competitive environments.

It is not just a plugin, but a full system designed to standardize and elevate speedrunning on Minecraft servers.
